'''ragasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylacine|xylacine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylacine|xylacine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ragasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rægæshæth|rægæshæth]] || [[word:rægæshæj|rægæshæj]] || [[word:rægæshæsh|rægæshæsh]] || [[word:rægæshæ|rægæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ragagashath|ragagashath]] || [[word:ragagashaj|ragagashaj]] || [[word:ragagashash|ragagashash]] || [[word:ragagasha|ragagasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ragashath|ragashath]] || [[word:ragashaj|ragashaj]] || [[word:ragashash|ragashash]] || [[word:ragasha|ragasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ragafshath|ragafshath]] || [[word:ragafshaj|ragafshaj]] || [[word:ragafshash|ragafshash]] || [[word:ragafshaf|ragafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ragashatha|ragashatha]] || [[word:ragashaja|ragashaja]] || [[word:ragashasha|ragashasha]] || [[word:ragashaka|ragashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ragashath|ragashath]] || [[word:ragashaj|ragashaj]] || [[word:ragashash|ragashash]] || [[word:ragasha|ragasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ragashathal|ragashathal]] || [[word:ragashajal|ragashajal]] || [[word:ragashashal|ragashashal]] || [[word:ragashakal|ragashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ragashathatha|ragashathatha]] || [[word:ragashajaja|ragashajaja]] || [[word:ragashashasha|ragashashasha]] || [[word:ragashaka|ragashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ragashathan|ragashathan]] || [[word:ragashajan|ragashajan]] || [[word:ragashashan|ragashashan]] || [[word:ragashakan|ragashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ragashathaoro|ragashathaoro]] || [[word:ragashajaoro|ragashajaoro]] || [[word:ragashashaoro|ragashashaoro]] || [[word:ragashakaoro|ragashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
